2605.04943.title: DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring
2605.04943.paper_summary: The condition monitoring (CM) of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) used in offshore, maritime, and industrial settings demands more than a classifier: inspectors need continuous severity estimates, maintenance recommendations, anomaly flags, deterioration timelines, and automated reports, all from a single inspection image. We present DART (Damage Assessment via Rope Transformer), a vision-language foundation model that addresses the full rope inspection workflow through a unified multi-task architecture. DART extends the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) to the cross-modal domain by coupling a Vision Transformer (ViT-H/14) with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via a Severity-Conditioned Cross-Modal Fusion (SC-CMF) module. Three architectural innovations drive the model's versatility: (1) HD-MASK, a saliency-guided masking strategy that focuses self-supervised reconstruction on damage-dense patches; (2) per-class learnable severity gates that adaptively weight language grounding by damage category; and (3) a Contrastive Damage Disentanglement (CDD) loss that shapes the embedding space to simultaneously encode damage type, severity ordering, and cross-modal semantics. Trained once on 4,270 images spanning 14 fine-grained rope damage classes, the frozen DART backbone supports downstream tasks without any task-specific fine-tuning: damage classification (93.22 % accuracy, 91.04 % macro-F1, +38.5 pp over a vision-only baseline), continuous severity regression (Spearman rho = 0.94, within-1-ordinal accuracy 99.6 %), few-shot recognition (89.2 % macro-F1 at 20 shots). These results demonstrate that DART functions as a general-purpose CM backbone that goes well beyond classification, providing actionable inspection intelligence from a single shared representation.
2605.04943.paper_summary_zh: 合成纖維繩索（SFRs）在海上、海事和工業環境中的狀況監測（CM）不僅僅需要分類器：檢查員需要持續的嚴重性評估、維護建議、異常標記、惡化時間表和自動報告，這些都來自單一的檢查影像。<lb/>我們提出了DART（透過繩索Transformer的損傷評估），這是一個視覺-語言基礎模型，通過統一的多任務架構解決完整的繩索檢查工作流程。<lb/>DART擴展了聯合嵌入預測架構（JEPA），通過將視覺Transformer（ViT-H/14）與Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct通過嚴重性條件交叉模態融合（SC-CMF）模塊結合，進入跨模態領域。<lb/>三項架構創新驅動了模型的多功能性：（1）HD-MASK，一種基於顯著性引導的遮罩策略，專注於損傷密集區域的自監督重建；（2）每類可學習的嚴重性閘，根據損傷類別自適應加權語言基礎；（3）對比損傷解耦（CDD）損失，塑造嵌入空間，同時編碼損傷類型、嚴重性排序和跨模態語義。<lb/>在4,270張涵蓋14個細分繩索損傷類別的影像上訓練一次，凍結的DART骨幹支持下游任務，無需任何特定任務的微調：損傷分類（93.22 %準確率，91.04 %宏觀-F1，較僅視覺基線提高38.5個百分點）、連續嚴重性回歸（斯皮爾曼rho = 0.94，1級內準確率99.6 %）、少量樣本識別（20個樣本時89.2 %宏觀-F1）。<lb/>這些結果顯示，DART作為一個通用的CM骨幹，遠超過分類，從單一共享表示中提供可行的檢查智能。
2605.04943.author: Anju Rani et.al.
2605.04943.authors: Anju Rani, Daniel Ortiz-Arroyo, Petar Durdevic
